title: IIM Bangalore Library Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Indian Institute of Management Bangalore (IIM Bangalore)
short_info: Indian Institute of Management Bangalore (IIM Bangalore) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 4 Library Trainee Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for education jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Maximum 25 years as on closing date of application.
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 25 years as on the closing date of application.

qualification.education_qualification: MLISc passed out after 2024, 2025 with first class.
qualification.details: Library Trainee: MLISc passed out after 2024, 2025 with first class.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Bangalore Library Trainee Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Bangalore to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Bangalore Library Trainee posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the IIM Bangalore Library Trainee recruitment is 04 June 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Library Trainee position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Library Trainee post announced by the Indian Institute of Management Bangalore.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Library Trainee role?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed MLISc (Master of Library and Information Science) after 2024 or 2025 with a first-class division to be eligible for the Library Trainee position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Library Trainee post is 25 years as of the closing date of the application.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Library Trainee position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Library Trainee post will receive a consolidated monthly stipend of Rs 25,000 (Rupees Twenty-Five Thousand Only).

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIM Bangalore Library Trainee recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to fill out the application form through the official website or the provided link.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Library Trainee posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Library Trainee positions will involve a written test followed by a personal interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the IIM Bangalore Library Trainee recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for the Library Trainee recruitment. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q9. What is the duration of the contract for the Library Trainee position?
faq.answer: The Library Trainee position is offered on a contract basis for a period of one year, as indicated in the brief description of the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article. Candidates are encouraged to visit the official website of IIM Bangalore for more details.
